who: HR operations teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR operations teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual preparation causes late filings, leading to compliance penalties. We automate payroll tax filing summaries instead of manual preparation.
problem: Timely payroll tax filing summaries are often missed, leading to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR operations teams
Indie Hackers posts about payroll workflows
DM outreach to HR operations teams with demo video
Community forums for sharing HR tools
try_it: Let users try Generate payroll tax summaries and Email summaries to HR ops teams on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Set default reminders for filing deadlines
Allow CSV import for existing payroll data
